session_context.active_objective: Production hardening for KU BAZAR C2C marketplace

current_task.title: Fix PWA telemetry hygiene and low-sample governance false positives

next_task.title: Commit, push, verify CI/Vercel, and observe production health/logs

technical_findings: Trendyol mobile web uses manifest + service worker + Workbox + push worker integration.
This repository currently has no first-class PWA implementation.
Current proxy matcher may need exclusions for service worker and manifest routes during PWA rollout.

Candidate E improves homepage/sell paint: brand logo now uses optimized Next/Image asset, category icons use optimized WebP assets, homepage category/filter shell streams separately from product grid, and /sell receives server-provided categories with client fallback only.

Candidate E deployed to production as commit 42e436f / Vercel dpl_7WHHzv7L6B3cp8u3tzRDqYKjcAgM. CI, Vercel, production HTTP smoke, browser smoke, and incident rehearsal passed, but strict PWA governance failed on poor-vitals rate 25.00% > 15.00%.

Candidate F burn-in follow-up on 2026-06-19 found the poor homepage sample aged out. Scheduled PWA Ramp Governance passed on 6ccde1e; manual normal governance warns only because the last 60 minutes had zero events, so rates are unavailable.

Candidate G adds a shared async fixed-window rate-limit backend with optional Upstash Redis REST enforcement, memory fallback, safe key normalization, and tests. Candidate G was initially deployed to production as commit 5736b21 / Vercel dpl_2ZHSbR5dzBJCYAeuF6Tjh2CggrgU.

Candidate H connected Vercel ku-online-dev to Upstash resource ku-bazar-rate-limit and proved production rate limiting is active through Vercel KV env names: rateLimit.configured=true, source=vercel-kv, backend=upstash, status=ok on the protected production health endpoint.

Candidate I executed Phase 5 Slice A Part 1: production npm audit high advisories were reduced from 4 to 0; final production audit has 6 total non-high advisories, and remaining high advisories are full-audit/dev-tooling paths primarily under the Vercel CLI transitive tree.

Candidate I required npm 10 lockfile normalization because GitHub Actions npm ci expected a nested optional @swc/helpers@0.5.23 entry. Follow-up commit 0b7c06f passed local npm 10 install validation, GitHub CI 27898130848, Vercel deployment dpl_WD1vgJdecGtQSdGqpEYzJdH1AzKA, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate J found Cleanup expired listings run 27898184065 failed before querying or mutating listings because Supabase realtime initialization on Node 20 lacks native WebSocket support after the dependency upgrade. Maintenance workflows were aligned to Node 22 and commit 10ba092 passed GitHub CI 27898810418, Vercel deployment dpl_Aa8vqtoQjfxz82w5R2w7raN8u7h7, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate K removed the repo-pinned Vercel CLI devDependency, kept Vercel CLI as external operator tooling, and added narrow transitive overrides so full npm audit has 0 high/critical advisories. Commit 8224378 passed GitHub CI 27919595935, Vercel deployment dpl_Hh7tiXrxJoMEzgkeccnXq83UnmWr, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate L observed production maintenance workflows without dispatching mutation-capable jobs. Product translations and embeddings run 27936502407, Cleanup expired listings run 27942446708, and Algolia Synonyms run 27937125441 all passed on current main commit 0afff39.
Candidate M adds shared timing-safe admin-token handling, Bearer/x-admin-token support, non-persistent service-role options for token-admin routes, and removes revalidate token debug logging.

Candidate M code commit d104fb7 passed GitHub CI run 27949940304 and Vercel deployment dpl_D4j3SU7FTsREweXC7n2HUW7pGxDA reached Ready. Canonical www.kubazar.net smoke passed for homepage, public health, and protected internal health with Bearer auth.
Candidate N adds redacted structured privileged-route events for token-admin/internal diagnostic routes and documents alert thresholds without mutating provider alert settings.
Candidate N updated tools/test-stubs/alias-loader.mjs so compiled ESM tests can resolve relative extensionless imports from dist-tests.

Candidate N code commit 5ae9b7b passed GitHub CI run 27952977699 and Vercel deployment dpl_FxF18o2AqUmMexss8yK2DPicApBQ reached Ready. Canonical www.kubazar.net smoke passed, and a deliberate unauthenticated internal-health request produced a redacted [privileged-route] unauthorized event in Vercel logs.
Candidate O adds a presence-only secret rotation readiness checker and a staging-first rotation runbook. This slice is docs/tooling only and does not rotate secrets or mutate provider settings.

Candidate O code commit b3a138e passed GitHub CI run 28034201187 and Vercel deployment dpl_4ThYGRQphDEqC1Ks6zGXsQdPDD6J reached Ready. Public production smoke passed and protected health returned database/storage/rate-limit ok with vercel-kv/upstash.

Candidate P0 read-only audit found an active production runtime error: /api/messages/conversations returns 500 with Supabase PGRST202 because public.list_conversation_summaries_secure() is missing from production.

Supabase production metadata currently exposes only legacy public.list_conversation_summaries(p_user_id uuid) among the checked conversation-list functions; the secure message RPC migrations from 20260223 are not reflected in production.

Supabase production has the message/conversation/product/public_user_profiles tables needed by the secure message RPCs, but products.listing_type and products.rental_term are absent while deployed sell/edit code sends those columns.
Supabase staging read-only SQL timed out even on select 1 during Candidate P0 audit; supabase projects list reports staging project iypynouqbmmvoqecfmuw as INACTIVE.

Candidate P0 prepared supabase/migrations/20260623152000_repair_secure_rpc_parity.sql and docs/security/CANDIDATE_P0_SUPABASE_RPC_REPAIR.md, but no staging or production SQL mutation has been executed.
DB MCP gate is ready after starting Docker Desktop and mapping local Supabase status env names to SUPABASE_URL/SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY/SUPABASE_ANON_KEY for the command.

Local supabase db reset applies migrations through 20260623152000, but exits non-zero during final storage bucket readiness check because the CLI probes 127.0.0.1:54321 while Docker published local Kong on 127.0.0.1:55321. Local metadata confirms migration 20260623152000, all seven secure RPCs, and Algolia listing-mode compatibility logic; authenticated storage readiness on 55321 returns 200.
Candidate P0 added npm run supabase:rpc:readiness for read-only Supabase project status, secure RPC, execute grant, migration, and listing-mode column checks.

Read-only reconfirmation on 2026-06-24: production kvmbtbhlapjlhfppomsw remains ACTIVE_HEALTHY but missing all seven secure RPCs, products.listing_type, products.rental_term, and migration 20260623152000; staging iypynouqbmmvoqecfmuw remains INACTIVE with restore version supabase-postgres-17.6.1.063 available.

Listing-mode drift audit: production products.images is text[], products.listing_type/products.rental_term are missing, listing-mode constraints/indexes are absent, and production search_products/search_products_semantic still use old signatures without listing-mode parameters or return fields.
Code audit confirmed sell/edit writes, product filters, Algolia paths, and product-search paths expect listing_type/rental_term; no direct app-side rpc('search_products...') usage was found.

Candidate P0 expanded npm run supabase:rpc:readiness to check products.images type, listing-mode constraints/indexes, and both legacy and listing-mode search RPC signatures. Production currently reports products.images _text and 2/4 search RPC signatures present.
Candidate P0 hardened npm run supabase:sql so mutating SQL requires --confirm-write and --confirm-project-ref matching --project-ref in addition to the DB MCP gate.

Candidate P0 Management API migration applies now support --record-migration, which records <14-digit-version>_<name>.sql files in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations after SQL execution. Future approved P0 remote applies should include this flag.
Candidate P0 added npm run supabase:project:status as a read-only Management API helper to report or wait for project status such as ACTIVE_HEALTHY after an approved restore/resume.
Candidate P0 operator tooling now has offline node:test coverage under tools/scripts/__tests__; npm test includes those tests through tools/scripts/run-tests.mjs.

Candidate P0 added supabase/migrations/20260624143000_product_listing_mode_parity.sql as a custom compatibility migration that preserves legacy search RPC signatures while adding listing-mode columns, constraints, index, and new search overloads. Local db reset applies through both P0 migrations, then still fails only at the known storage readiness port drift.

Approved staging restore attempt for iypynouqbmmvoqecfmuw on 2026-06-24 failed because Supabase reported the project has been paused for more than 90 days and cannot be restored. Staging remains INACTIVE; no SQL was applied remotely.
Replacement staging project cuotmvhhgakjeqdsfziu (ku-online-staging, eu-central-1) was created and is ACTIVE_HEALTHY. The generated DB password was not printed or stored.
supabase branches list for production kvmbtbhlapjlhfppomsw currently lists only the default main branch, so no production-clone staging branch is available.

Candidate P0 readiness checker now defaults to production plus replacement staging and handles blank Supabase projects by reporting missing migration metadata instead of crashing on a missing supabase_migrations.schema_migrations table.

Supabase Branching was attempted with a schema-only persistent branch command for ku-online-staging-p0, but Supabase returned 402 because Branching requires the Pro plan or above. No branch was created.
Without upgrading Supabase, the best available staging-first path was standalone replacement staging initialization, then exact production SQL approval for the two P0 migrations.

Standalone staging cuotmvhhgakjeqdsfziu was initialized by applying all 99 repository migration files through tools/scripts/supabase-apply-sql.mjs with --record-migration. Staging readiness now passes with both P0 migrations present, seven secure RPCs present, listing-mode schema/search gates complete, 99 migrations recorded, 13 categories, and public product-images bucket present.

Parity against production intentionally reports drift: standalone staging has P0 repair objects and no missing tables/functions relative to production, but production has five reader/TTS migration-history rows absent from staging. Do not run broad migration catch-up on production.

Candidate P0 production apply completed on 2026-06-24: migrations 20260623152000 and 20260624143000 were applied to production kvmbtbhlapjlhfppomsw with --record-migration. Production readiness now passes with both P0 migrations present, seven secure RPCs present, listing-mode schema/search gates complete, public smoke 200, protected health 200 with database/storage/rate-limit ok, and signed-out /api/messages/conversations returning 401 instead of 500.

Candidate P0 closeout validation passed before commit: npm test, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run build with temporary Vercel production env, git diff --check, production/staging project status, and production/staging RPC readiness. Authenticated browser/user-flow smoke remains pending a real signed-in session.

Candidate P0 source-control/deploy closeout completed: commit 0b3da09 was pushed to main, GitHub CI run 28121756571 passed, Vercel deployment dpl_81akCqA4Qu3XvLuCW9gAxv8rcU9C is Ready on production aliases, post-deploy public/protected smoke passed, and Vercel logs showed only expected smoke traffic.

Authenticated production smoke on 2026-06-25 confirmed Google sign-in, signed-in header controls, and GET /api/messages/conversations returning 200 in a real browser session. Sale listing creation with image upload, product detail/category visibility, favorite creation, owner deletion, and cleanup passed; production read-only DB cleanup count for the two smoke listing IDs returned 0.

Authenticated production smoke originally found two production blockers: /api/search/algolia-sync returned 500 with Supabase SQL error 42601 near a comma, causing the new listing to miss title search; and /sell did not expose rental/listing-mode controls for property, storing the property smoke listing as listing_type=sale and rental_term=null.

Candidate P1 repaired the Algolia secure product-row RPC with migration 20260625104000_fix_algolia_product_row_secure.sql. The migration was applied to replacement staging cuotmvhhgakjeqdsfziu and production kvmbtbhlapjlhfppomsw with --record-migration, and readiness now requires all three repair migrations and reports the Algolia RPC body as ok.

Post-repair signed-in production smoke created temporary listing 571fdb0a-daab-4f4c-a952-03636a5c7fc1. Product insert returned 201 and /api/search/algolia-sync returned HTTP 200 with no recent 500 logs, but the response was {"ok":false} and title search still failed because Vercel production lacks ALGOLIA_APP_ID, ALGOLIA_ADMIN_API_KEY, ALGOLIA_SEARCH_API_KEY, and ALGOLIA_INDEX_NAME. The smoke listing was deleted through the owner UI and read-only production DB cleanup returned matching_smoke_rows 0.

Candidate P1b prepared a manual-only Algolia Provider Rollout workflow plus tools/scripts/algolia-search-key.mjs. The workflow can use an existing ALGOLIA_SEARCH_API_KEY GitHub secret or create/reuse a restricted search-only key scoped to the base product index and replicas, sync all four Algolia env vars into Vercel production, redeploy, and backfill the Algolia index.

First Algolia Provider Rollout dispatch 28197874539 failed before provider mutation: Algolia returned 403 Invalid Application-ID or API key while listing/creating API keys. After adding ALGOLIA_SEARCH_API_KEY, second dispatch 28198477569 passed search-key resolution but failed before Vercel env sync because the GitHub VERCEL_TOKEN could not access the forced Vercel scope. Third dispatch 28198606392 confirmed GitHub secret VERCEL_TOKEN is invalid. Vercel env, Vercel deployment, and Algolia index were not changed.

Candidate P1b provider rollout completed on run 28200724605 after correcting the linked Vercel project behavior and accounting for Vercel sensitive production env values. The run verified Algolia env names, redeployed production, and backfilled 17 Algolia product records.

Candidate P1b added a manual Algolia Production Smoke workflow and tools/scripts/algolia-production-smoke.mjs. Smoke run 28201312665 created temporary product fdea28c2-91bf-42b2-a9f4-508e091fbdeb, verified direct Algolia search and public /api/products/search, then deleted the Algolia object and DB row.

Candidate P1c signed-in production smoke on 2026-06-26 created temporary listing 34c8165d-2bef-4441-8ec3-a51f3faa0786 through /sell. Supabase product insert returned 201, /api/search/algolia-sync returned 200 with {"ok":true}, title search found the listing, owner delete returned 200, public search cleanup returned count 0, and read-only production DB cleanup returned matching_smoke_rows 0.

The P1c Vercel production log scan found separate search follow-ups: Supabase Edge Function product-search returned 500 while /products and /api/products/search returned fallback 200, and /api/search/click returned 500 because search_click_events insert hit RLS 42501.

Candidate P1d removed the stale Supabase product-search Edge Function from the app search hot path. Successful Algolia zero-hit searches now return directly, and Algolia-unavailable fallback uses the existing Supabase product query.

Candidate P1d applied existing migration 20260223100328_search_click_events_rls_insert_policies.sql to production with --record-migration. Production now has anonymous and authenticated insert policies for search_click_events, and runtime /api/search/click smoke returned {"ok":true}.

Candidate P1d commit b18b3eb passed GitHub CI run 28242646711, deployed to Vercel production as https://ku-online-jw12n222g-ku-onlines-projects.vercel.app, and post-deploy smokes passed for public health, existing product search, no-result product search, search-click telemetry, and Vercel error-log scan.

Candidate P2 repaired rental listing controls by switching /sell, edit, and shared create/update validation from hardcoded Property category ID checks to the existing isPropertyCategory(id, name) helper. This preserves the fixed-ID path while supporting production category rows mapped to visible Property by name.
Candidate P2 local validation passed on 2026-06-27: npm test, npm run typecheck, rerun npm run lint, and npm run build with a temporary Vercel production env file.
Candidate P2 commit 71c85ee passed GitHub CI run 28282489108 and deployed to Vercel production as dpl_M3rkZPdn7bmQ5G9Axy7GC3g3X2Ei.

Candidate P2 signed-in production smoke created temporary rental listing f592fc6c-3b9f-4b14-af18-cb760370fb3b through /sell with Property, For rent, Monthly, and Duhok; homepage/detail rendered For Rent / Monthly with /month; owner delete returned 200; deleted detail returned 404; public title search cleanup returned count 0/items 0; browser console had 0 errors/warnings.

Candidate P4C implements PWA telemetry hygiene: server normalization rejects unsupported/implausible web-vital names and values, client telemetry avoids hidden-document web-vital sends and applies the same caps, and pwa-ramp-governance treats poor-vitals rate as blocking only when web-vital sample count meets summary.thresholds.minSamples.

Candidate P4C local validation passed with focused governance tests, telemetry-store tests through npm test, typecheck, lint, production build with a temporary Vercel env file, and git diff --check. Source-control, CI, Vercel deploy, and scheduled-governance observation remain pending.

decisions.decision: Use phased PWA rollout with conservative cache strategy to avoid auth/session regressions.
Add dedicated agent-memory system (state + journal + updater script) before implementation work.

open_risks: Service worker caching can cause stale authenticated behavior if API routes are cached incorrectly.
Proxy matcher may interfere with service worker delivery if not explicitly excluded.
Local browser validation still shows 400s for two local Supabase product image resources on /; this appears tied to local storage/test data, not the Candidate E image asset changes.

Production read-only telemetry after Candidate E showed one / FCP poor sample at 3740ms and one / LCP needs-improvement sample at 3792ms with good TTFB. That sample aged out by 2026-06-19, but current RUM volume is too low to claim full homepage performance clearance.
Distributed rate limiting is now active through Vercel KV/Upstash, but the current provider resource is free tier with eviction enabled and should be revisited before broad public launch.
Shared ADMIN_REVALIDATE_TOKEN still exists for legacy admin/internal automation; Candidate M hardens comparison and Bearer support but does not replace token routes with per-user admin sessions.
Privileged admin and service-role server paths still need continued ownership-check, authorization-boundary, test, and audit-log hardening.
Supabase CLI currently warns that it does not expose `supabase mcp`; deploy MCP gate still passes because required Vercel checks are ready.
Manual dispatch requires explicit approval because cleanup/i18n/synonyms workflows can mutate production listings, storage, translations, embeddings, and Algolia indexes.

GitHub scheduled workflows are best-effort; observed product maintenance cadence was not a strict 30-minute interval, so production-critical maintenance may need freshness alerting or a scheduler with stronger delivery guarantees.
Bearer-token operator requests should target canonical https://www.kubazar.net because the apex https://kubazar.net redirects to www and cross-host redirects can drop the Authorization header.
Provider-side Sentry/Vercel privileged-route alerts are not configured yet; Candidate N documents thresholds for a later explicit provider-mutation phase.
Secret readiness checks prove env names are present, not that values are correct. Real rotation still requires staging-first smoke checks and explicit production approval.
Do not blindly apply all missing local Supabase migrations; production has later remote migration versions and at least one local migration targets a table absent in production.

Local Supabase reset still reports final storage readiness failure on the CLI-reported port even though authenticated storage readiness succeeds on Docker's actual published port; keep this separated from repair migration correctness.
Do not run broad migration catch-up on production without a separate plan. Production has later reader/TTS migration-history rows and standalone staging is intentionally not a production clone.
Algolia provider/runtime public search and signed-in create-flow sync are now smoke-proven after env rollout, redeploy, backfill, controlled smoke, and real /sell create/search/delete validation.

The stale Supabase Edge Function product-search remains deployed but should be treated as unused by the app search path after P1d deploy. Do not reintroduce it into the hot path without updating/deploying the function and adding smoke coverage.

Scheduled PWA SLO Alerts workflow run 28241474623 failed on 2026-06-26 because production detected an active fail-status PWA alert but Vercel production is missing PWA_SLO_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL, so delivery was persisted as skipped_config.

Candidate P3 commit cf88f81 adds GitHub workflow diagnostics for PWA SLO alert endpoint failures and promotes PWA SLO alert envs to recommended in the secret readiness checker. CI run 28283615943 passed and Vercel deployment dpl_BkqTa7BHCoajugonwtiFV5Sc4CnW reached Ready.

Scheduled PWA Ramp Governance run 28283521030 failed on 2026-06-27 with summary_status fail, active alerts 1, and poor-vitals rate 31.48% over the 15.00% gate. P4B later found this window included implausible stale web-vital values such as FCP 233804ms and LCP 1752544ms, so telemetry hygiene must be improved before treating every poor-vitals percentage as a normal rendering regression.

P4B read-only diagnosis on 2026-06-28 found current scheduled PWA governance and SLO alert runs are green, but telemetry volume is very low: only 2 events in the latest 60-minute read-only DB window and 6 events in 24 hours. Governance run 28305859484 failed despite summary_status pass and active alerts 0 because the script failed on poor-vitals rate with only 3 rated web-vital samples.

P4C telemetry/governance hygiene is implemented locally but not yet deployed: reject unknown/implausible web-vital values server-side, suppress hidden/stale web-vital sends client-side, and make tools/scripts/pwa-ramp-governance.mjs apply poor-vitals failure only when web-vital sample volume meets summary.thresholds.minSamples; below that warns instead of failing scheduled governance.

Rental listing creation is production-smoke proven for the /sell create/delete flow. Edit form behavior received the same category-name fix and is code/build validated, but editing an existing rental listing was not separately browser-smoked.
